tafsir.siraj-ar: هَٰذَا ذِكۡرٞۚ وَإِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابٖ (لَحُسْنَ مَآبٍ: حُسْنَ مَرْجِعٍ فيِ الآخِرَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ini adalah kehormatan) bagi mereka, yaitu mendapat pujian yang baik di sini. (Dan sesungguhnya bagi orang-orang yang bertakwa) antara lain adalah termasuk mereka (benar-benar disediakan tempat kembali yang baik) nanti di akhirat

ar: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدۡنࣲ مُّفَتَّحَةࣰ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡوَ ٰبُ
ar_simple: جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ مُفَتَّحَةً لَهُمُ الْأَبْوَابُ

t.sahih-int: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them
t.asad: gardens of perpetual bliss, with gates wide-open to them
t.yusuf-ali: Gardens of Eternity, whose doors will (ever) be open to them
t.pickthall: Gardens of Eden, whereof the gates are opened for them
t.arberry: Gardens of Eden, whereof the gates are open to them
t.hilali-khan: Adn (Edn) Paradise (everlasting Gardens), whose doors will be open for them, [It is said (in Tafsir At-Tabari, Part 23, Page 174) that one can speak to the doors, just one tells it to open and close, and it will open or close as it is ordered
t.itani: The Gardens of Eden, with their doors wide-open for them.
t.mubarakpuri: `Adn Paradise, whose doors will be opened for them.
t.qarib: Gardens of Eden, whose gates will open to them
t.wahiduddin: the Gardens of eternity with gates thrown wide open to them
t.shakir: The gardens of perpetuity, the doors are opened for them
t.haleem: Gardens of lasting bliss with gates wide open
t.maariful: everlasting gardens, with (their) doors opened for them
t.khattab: the Gardens of Eternity, whose gates will be open for them
t.ghali: Gardens of Adn (Eden) whereof the gates are open for them
t.irving: gardens of Eden whose gates will swing open for them
t.iwq: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them

t_id.kemenag: (yaitu) surga 'Adn yang pintu-pintunya terbuka bagi mereka,
t_id.sabiq: Allah telah menyediakan surga 'Adn yang pintu-pintunya selalu terbuka untuk mereka. Tak seorang pun dapat menghalangi mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu surga Adn) menjadi Badal atau 'Athaf Bayan bagi lafal Lahusna Ma-aab (yang pintu-pintunya terbuka bagi mereka) artinya, pintu-pintu surga itu terbuka lebar-lebar buat mereka.
t_id.iwq: (yaitu) surga 'Adn yang pintu-pintunya terbuka bagi mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «جنات عدن» بدل أو عطف بيان لحسن مآب «مفتتحة لهم الأبواب» منها
tafsir.siraj-ar: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدۡنٖ مُّفَتَّحَةٗ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡوَٰبُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu surga Adn) menjadi Badal atau 'Athaf Bayan bagi lafal Lahusna Ma-aab (yang pintu-pintunya terbuka bagi mereka) artinya, pintu-pintu surga itu terbuka lebar-lebar buat mereka

ar: مُتَّكِءِینَ فِیهَا یَدۡعُونَ فِیهَا بِفَـٰكِهَةࣲ كَثِیرَةࣲ وَشَرَابࣲ
ar_simple: مُتَّكِئِينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَاكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ وَشَرَابٍ

t.sahih-int: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink
t.asad: wherein they will recline, [and] wherein they may [freely] call for many a fruit and drink
t.yusuf-ali: Therein will they recline (at ease): Therein can they call (at pleasure) for fruit in abundance, and (delicious) drink
t.pickthall: Wherein, reclining, they call for plenteous fruit and cool drink (that is) therein
t.arberry: wherein they recline, and wherein they call for fruits abundant, and sweet potions
t.hilali-khan: Therein they will recline; therein they will call for fruits in abundance and drinks
t.itani: Relaxing therein, and calling for abundant fruit and beverage.
t.mubarakpuri: Therein they will recline; therein they will call for fruits in abundance and drinks;
t.qarib: where they will recline, calling for abundant fruit and drink
t.wahiduddin: They will be comfortably seated; reclining, they will call for abundant fruit and drink
t.shakir: Reclining therein, calling therein for many fruits and drink
t.haleem: They will be comfortably seated; they will call for abundant fruit and drink
t.maariful: They will be relaxing in it, calling there for plenteous fruits and drinks
t.khattab: There they will recline, calling for abundant fruit and drink
t.ghali: Reclining therein, they call for many fruits and (cool) drink therein
t.irving: Relaxing there, they will call for much fruit and drink in them
t.iwq: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink

t_id.kemenag: di dalamnya mereka bertelekan (diatas dipan-dipan) sambil meminta buah-buahan yang banyak dan minuman di surga itu.
t_id.sabiq: Di sana mereka duduk bersandar di atas ranjang dan dipan seperti layaknya hartawan. Di dalamnya, mereka bersenang-senang dengan selalu meminta buah-buahan dan minuman yang banyak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Di dalamnya mereka bertelekan) di atas dipan-dipan (sambil meminta buah-buahan yang banyak dan minuman di surga itu.)
t_id.iwq: di dalamnya mereka bertelekan (diatas dipan-dipan) sambil meminta buah-buahan yang banyak dan minuman di surga itu.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «متكئين فيها» على الأرائك «يدعون فيها بفاكهة كثيرة وشراب»
tafsir.siraj-ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدۡعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَٰكِهَةٖ كَثِيرَةٖ وَشَرَابٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Di dalamnya mereka bertelekan) di atas dipan-dipan (sambil meminta buah-buahan yang banyak dan minuman di surga itu)

ar: ۞ وَعِندَهُمۡ قَـٰصِرَ ٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ أَتۡرَابٌ
ar_simple: ۞ وَعِنْدَهُمْ قَاصِرَاتُ الطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ

t.sahih-int: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances and of equal age
t.asad: having beside them well-matched mates of modest gaze.”
t.yusuf-ali: And beside them will be chaste women restraining their glances, (companions) of equal age
t.pickthall: And with them are those of modest gaze, companions
t.arberry: and with them maidens restraining their glances of equal age
t.hilali-khan: And beside them will be chaste females (virgins) restraining their glances only for their husbands, (and) of equal ages
t.itani: With them will be attendants with modest gaze, of same age.
t.mubarakpuri: And beside them will be Qasirat-at-Tarf, (and) of equal ages.
t.qarib: having beside them well-matched mates of modest gaze
t.wahiduddin: with them, they will have pure, modest women of an equal age
t.shakir: And with them shall be those restraining their eyes, equals in age
t.haleem: they will have well-matched [wives] with modest gaze
t.maariful: and in their company there will be females restricting their glances (to their husbands, and) of matching ages
t.khattab: And with them will be maidens of modest gaze and equal age
t.ghali: And in their presence are (maidens) restraining their glances (and) like of age
t.irving: With them there will be bashful mates equal in age to them
t.iwq: And with them will be women limiting their glances and of equal age

t_id.kemenag: Dan pada sisi mereka (ada bidadari-bidadari) yang tidak liar pandangannya dan sebaya umurnya.
t_id.sabiq: Di dalam surga, mereka akan memiliki istri-istri yang pandangannya hanya tertuju kepada suaminya saja. Mereka semua seusia sehingga dapat lebih mudah menemukan keserasian.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada sisi mereka ada bidadari-bidadari yang tidak liar pandangannya) yakni mereka hanya memandang kepada suaminya dan menundukkan pandangan mata dari yang lainnya (dan sebaya umurnya) umur mereka sebaya, yaitu sekitar tiga puluh tiga tahunan. Lafal Atraabun adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal Turbun.
t_id.iwq: Dan pada sisi mereka (ada bidadari-bidadari) yang tidak liar pandangannya dan sebaya umurnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وعندهم قاصرات الطرف» حابسات العين على أزواجهن «أتراب» أسنانهن واحدة وهن بنات ثلاث وثلاثين سنة جمع ترب
tafsir.siraj-ar: ۞وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ أَتۡرَابٌ (قَاصِرَاتُ الطَّرْفِ: لَا يَنْظُرْنَ إِلَى غَيْرِ أَزْوَاجِهِنَّ, أَتْرَابٌ: مُتَسَاوِيَاتُ السِّنِّ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada sisi mereka ada bidadari-bidadari yang tidak liar pandangannya) yakni mereka hanya memandang kepada suaminya dan menundukkan pandangan mata dari yang lainnya (dan sebaya umurnya) umur mereka sebaya, yaitu sekitar tiga puluh tiga tahunan. Lafal Atraabun adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal Turbun

ar: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِیَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
ar_simple: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوْمِ الْحِسَابِ

t.sahih-int: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account
t.asad: This is what you are promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.yusuf-ali: Such is the Promise made, to you for the Day of Account
t.pickthall: This it is that ye are promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.arberry: This is what you were promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.hilali-khan: This it is what you (Al-Muttaqun - the pious) are promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.itani: This is what you are promised for the Day of Account.
t.mubarakpuri: This it is what you are promised for the Day of Reckoning!
t.qarib: This is what you are promised for the Day of Account
t.wahiduddin: This is what you were promised on the Day of Reckoning
t.shakir: This is what you are promised for the day of reckoning
t.haleem: ‘This is what you are promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.maariful: This is what you are being promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.khattab: This is what you are promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.ghali: This is what you are promised for the Day of Reckoning
t.irving: This is what you were promised on the Day of Reckoning
t.iwq: This is what you, the righteous, are promised for the Day of Account

t_id.kemenag: Inilah apa yang dijanjikan kepadamu pada hari berhisab.
t_id.sabiq: Nikmat seperti inilah yang dijanjikan untuk kalian pada hari kiamat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Inilah) hal-hal yang telah disebutkan itu (apa yang dijanjikan kepada kalian) dapat dibaca Yuu'aduuna atau Tuu'aduuna, kalau dibaca Tuu'aduna berarti Iltifat (pada hari berhisab) pada saat hari berhisab.
t_id.iwq: Inilah apa yang dijanjikan kepadamu pada hari berhisab.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «هذا» المذكور «ما يوعدون» بالغيبة وبالخطاب التفافا «ليوم الحساب» أي لأجله
tafsir.siraj-ar: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Inilah) hal-hal yang telah disebutkan itu (apa yang dijanjikan kepada kalian) dapat dibaca Yuu'aduuna atau Tuu'aduuna, kalau dibaca Tuu'aduna berarti Iltifat (pada hari berhisab) pada saat hari berhisab

ar: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَرِزۡقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
ar_simple: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُ مِنْ نَفَادٍ

t.sahih-int: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion
t.asad: this, verily, shall be Our provision [for you], with no end to it
t.yusuf-ali: Truly such will be Our Bounty (to you); it will never fail
t.pickthall: Lo! this in truth is Our provision, which will never waste away
t.arberry: this is Our provision, unto which there is no end
t.hilali-khan: (It will be said to them)! Verily, this is Our Provision which will never finish
t.itani: Such is Our bounty, inexhaustible.
t.mubarakpuri: (It will be said to them)! Verily, this is Our provision which will never finish.
t.qarib: This is Our provision, which will never run out
t.wahiduddin: Our provision for you will never be exhausted
t.shakir: Most surely this is Our sustenance; it shall never come to an end
t.haleem: Our provision for you will never end.’
t.maariful: Surely, that is provision provided by Us, to which there is no end
t.khattab: This is indeed Our provision that will never end
t.ghali: Surely this is indeed Our provision; in no way will it suffer depletion
t.irving: this is Our provision which will never he used up
t.iwq: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya ini adalah benar-benar rezeki dari Kami yang tiada habis-habisnya.
t_id.sabiq: Sungguh, ini benar-benar karunia Kami yang tidak ada habisnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ini adalah benar-benar rezeki dari Kami yang tiada habis-habisnya) yang tak putus-putusnya; jumlah ayat ini menjadi Haal dari lafal Larizqunaa, atau sebagai Khabar kedua dari Inna, artinya selama-lamanya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya ini adalah benar-benar rezeki dari Kami yang tiada habis-habisnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن هذا لرزقنا ما له من نفاد» أي انقطاع والجملة حال من رزقنا أو خبر ثان لإن، أي دائما أو دائم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزۡقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ (نَّفَادٍ: انْقِطَاعٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ini adalah benar-benar rezeki dari Kami yang tiada habis-habisnya) yang tak putus-putusnya; jumlah ayat ini menjadi Haal dari lafal Larizqunaa, atau sebagai Khabar kedua dari Inna, artinya selama-lamanya

ar: هَـٰذَاۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّـٰغِینَ لَشَرَّ مَءَابࣲ
ar_simple: هَٰذَا ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّاغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَآبٍ

t.sahih-int: This [is so]. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return
t.asad: All this [for the righteous]: but, verily, the most evil of all goals awaits those who are wont to transgress the bounds of what is right
t.yusuf-ali: Yea, such! but - for the wrong-doers will be an evil place of (Final) Return
t.pickthall: This (is for the righteous). And lo! for the transgressors there with be an evil journey's end
t.arberry: All this; but for the insolent awaits an ill resort
t.hilali-khan: This is so! And for the Taghun (transgressors, disobedient to Allah and His Messenger - disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah, criminals, etc.), will be an evil final return (Fire)
t.itani: All This. But the transgressors will have a miserable return.
t.mubarakpuri: This is so! And for the Taghin will be an evil final return.
t.qarib: But, truly, for the transgressors is an evil place of return
t.wahiduddin: But the arrogant will have the worst return
t.shakir: This (shall be so); and most surely there is an evil resort for the inordinate ones
t.haleem: But the evildoers will have the worst place to return to
t.maariful: Having said this, the transgressors will surely have the most evil place to return
t.khattab: That is that. And the transgressors will certainly have the worst destination
t.ghali: This is (for the righteous); and surely for the inordinate (i.e., tyrants) there will indeed be an evil resorting
t.irving: Such will it be, while the arrogant will have the worst retreat
t.iwq: This is so. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return

t_id.kemenag: Beginilah (keadaan mereka). Dan sesungguhnya bagi orang-orang yang durhaka benar-benar (disediakan) tempat kembali yang buruk,
t_id.sabiq: Kenikmatan ini adalah balasan bagi orang-orang yang bertakwa. Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang durhaka terhadap para nabi, akan memperoleh tempat kembali yang buruk.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Beginilah) keadaan yang dialami oleh orang-orang yang beriman. (Dan sesungguhnya bagi orang-orang yang durhaka) kalimat ayat ini merupakan jumlah Isti'naf atau kalimat baru (benar-benar disediakan tempat kembali yang paling buruk.)
t_id.iwq: Beginilah (keadaan mereka). Dan sesungguhnya bagi orang-orang yang durhaka benar-benar (disediakan) tempat kembali yang buruk,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «هذا» المذكور للمؤمنين «وإن للطاغين» مستأنف «لشر مآب»
tafsir.siraj-ar: هَٰذَاۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّـٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابٖ (لَشَرَّ مَآبٍ: أَسْوَأَ مَرْجعٍ فِي الآخِرَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Beginilah) keadaan yang dialami oleh orang-orang yang beriman. (Dan sesungguhnya bagi orang-orang yang durhaka) kalimat ayat ini merupakan jumlah Isti'naf atau kalimat baru (benar-benar disediakan tempat kembali yang paling buruk)

ar: جَهَنَّمَ یَصۡلَوۡنَهَا فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمِهَادُ
ar_simple: جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا فَبِئْسَ الْمِهَادُ

t.sahih-int: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place
t.asad: hell will they have to endure - and how vile a resting-place
t.yusuf-ali: Hell!- they will burn therein, - an evil bed (indeed, to lie on)
t.pickthall: Hell, where they will burn, an evil resting-place
t.arberry: Gehenna, wherein they are roasted - an evil cradling
t.hilali-khan: Hell! Where they will burn, and worst (indeed) is that place to rest
t.itani: Hell; in which they will roast; what a miserable abode!
t.mubarakpuri: Hell! Where they will enter it, and worst (indeed) is that place to rest!
t.qarib: Hell, where they will burn. What an evil resting place
t.wahiduddin: they will burn, in Hell, an evil resting place
t.shakir: Hell; they shall enter it, so evil is the resting-place
t.haleem: Hell to burn in, an evil place to stay
t.maariful: the Jahannam , in which they will enter. So, how evil is that place to rest
t.khattab: Hell, where they will burn. What an evil place to rest
t.ghali: Hell, wherein they roast, miserable then is the cradling
t.irving: Hell! They will roast in it, and on an awful couch
t.iwq: Hell, which they will enter to burn, and wretched is the resting place

t_id.kemenag: (yaitu) neraka Jahannam, yang mereka masuk ke dalamnya; maka amat buruklah Jahannam itu sebagai tempat tinggal.
t_id.sabiq: Yaitu neraka jahanam. Mereka akan memasukinya dan merasakan sengatan panasnya. Neraka jahanam adalah seburuk-buruk tempat tinggal.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu neraka Jahanam, yang mereka masuk ke dalamnya) mereka dimasukkan ke dalamnya (maka amat buruklah Jahanam itu sebagai tempat tinggal) artinya, hamparan yang paling buruk.
t_id.iwq: (yaitu) neraka neraka, yang mereka masuk ke dalamnya; maka amat buruklah neraka itu sebagai tempat tinggal.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «جهنم يصلونها» يدخلونها «فبئس المهاد» الفراش
tafsir.siraj-ar: جَهَنَّمَ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَا فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمِهَادُ (يَصْلَوْنَهَا: يَدْخُلُونَهَا وَيُقَاسُونَ حَرَّهَا, الْمِهَادُ: الفِرَاشُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu neraka Jahanam, yang mereka masuk ke dalamnya) mereka dimasukkan ke dalamnya (maka amat buruklah Jahanam itu sebagai tempat tinggal) artinya, hamparan yang paling buruk

ar: هَـٰذَا فَلۡیَذُوقُوهُ حَمِیمࣱ وَغَسَّاقࣱ
ar_simple: هَٰذَا فَلْيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٌ وَغَسَّاقٌ

t.sahih-int: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and [foul] purulence
t.asad: This, [then, for them -] so let them taste it: burning despair and ice-cold darkness
t.yusuf-ali: Yea, such! - then shall they taste it,- a boiling fluid, and a fluid dark, murky, intensely cold
t.pickthall: Here is a boiling and an ice-cold draught, so let them taste it
t.arberry: All this; so let them taste it - boiling water and pus
t.hilali-khan: This is so! Then let them taste it, a boiling fluid and dirty wound discharges
t.itani: All this. Let them taste it—boiling and bitter cold.
t.mubarakpuri: This is so! Then let them taste it - Hamim and Ghassaq.
t.qarib: This! So let them taste boiling water and [foul] pus
t.wahiduddin: all this will be theirs; let them taste it -- a scalding, dark, foul fluid
t.shakir: This (shall be so); so let them taste it, boiling and intensely cold (drink)
t.haleem: all this will be theirs: let them taste it- a scalding, dark, foul fluid
t.maariful: Let them taste this: hot water and pus
t.khattab: Let them then taste this: boiling water and ˹oozing˺ pus
t.ghali: This is (their reward); so let them taste it: scalding (water) and constantly (overflowing) pus
t.irving: Here it is; let them taste it: scalding water and bitter cold
t.iwq: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and foul purulence

t_id.kemenag: Inilah (azab neraka), biarlah mereka merasakannya, (minuman mereka) air yang sangat panas dan air yang sangat dingin.
t_id.sabiq: Ini adalah air yang sangat panas dan minuman penghuni jahanam. Mereka diperintahkan untuk merasakannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Inilah) azab neraka; pengertian ini disimpulkan dari lafal sesudahnya (biarlah mereka merasakannya, minuman mereka air yang sangat panas) lagi membakar (dan nanah ahli neraka) dapat dibaca Ghassaaqun atau Ghasaaqun artinya nanah yang meleleh dari penghuni neraka.
t_id.iwq: Inilah (azab neraka), biarlah mereka merasakannya, (minuman mereka) air yang sangat panas dan air yang sangat dingin.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «هذا» أي العذاب المفهوم مما بعده «فليذوقوه حميم» أي ماء حار محرق «وغسَّاق» بالتخفيف والتشديد: ما يسيل من صديد أهل النار
tafsir.siraj-ar: هَٰذَا فَلۡيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٞ وَغَسَّاقٞ (حَمِيمٌ: مَاءٌ شَدِيدُ الحَرَارَةِ, وَغَسَّاقٌ: صَدِيدٌ سَائِلٌ مِنْ أَجْسَادِ أَهْلِ النَّارِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Inilah) azab neraka; pengertian ini disimpulkan dari lafal sesudahnya (biarlah mereka merasakannya, minuman mereka air yang sangat panas) lagi membakar (dan nanah ahli neraka) dapat dibaca Ghassaaqun atau Ghasaaqun artinya nanah yang meleleh dari penghuni neraka

ar: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكۡلِهِۦۤ أَزۡوَ ٰجٌ
ar_simple: وَآخَرُ مِنْ شَكْلِهِ أَزْوَاجٌ

t.sahih-int: And other [punishments] of its type [in various] kinds
t.asad: and, coupled with it, further [suffering] of a similar nature
t.yusuf-ali: And other Penalties of a similar kind, to match them
t.pickthall: And other (torment) of the kind in pairs (the two extremes)
t.arberry: and other torments of the like kind coupled together
t.hilali-khan: And other torments of similar kind, all together
t.itani: And similar torments of diverse kinds.
t.mubarakpuri: And other of similar kind - all together!
t.qarib: and other such punishments
t.wahiduddin: and other such torments
t.shakir: And other (punishment) of the same kind-- of various sorts
t.haleem: and other such torments
t.maariful: and other things similar to it of various kinds
t.khattab: and other torments of the same sort
t.ghali: And other (torments) of like kind paired together
t.irving: and others of its sort to match
t.iwq: And other punishments of its type in various kinds

t_id.kemenag: Dan azab yang lain yang serupa itu berbagai macam.
t_id.sabiq: Azab lain yang seperti ini masih banyak lagi dan bermacam-macam.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan azab yang lain) dapat dibaca dalam bentuk jamak sehingga menjadi Ukharu atau dapat pula dibaca dalam bentuk Mufrad sehingga bacaannya menjadi Aakharu (yang serupa itu) serupa dengan azab yang telah disebutkan tadi, yaitu air yang sangat panas dan cairan nanah (berbagai macam) beraneka ragam siksaan, maksudnya, azab mereka bermacam-macam.
t_id.iwq: Dan azab yang lain yang serupa itu berbagai macam.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وآخر» بالجمع والإفراد «من شكله» أي مثل المذكور من الحميم والغساق «أزواج» أصناف، أي عذابهم من أنواع مختلفة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكۡلِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٌ (وَآخَرُ: عَذَابٌ آخَرُ, مِن شَكْلِهِ: مِنْ مِثْلِهِ, أَزْوَاجٌ: أَصْنَافٌ، وَأَلْوَانٌ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan azab yang lain) dapat dibaca dalam bentuk jamak sehingga menjadi Ukharu atau dapat pula dibaca dalam bentuk Mufrad sehingga bacaannya menjadi Aakharu (yang serupa itu) serupa dengan azab yang telah disebutkan tadi, yaitu air yang sangat panas dan cairan nanah (berbagai macam) beraneka ragam siksaan, maksudnya, azab mereka bermacam-macam

ar: هَـٰذَا فَوۡجࣱ مُّقۡتَحِمࣱ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُوا۟ ٱلنَّارِ
ar_simple: هَٰذَا فَوْجٌ مُقْتَحِمٌ مَعَكُمْ ۖ لَا مَرْحَبًا بِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ صَالُو النَّارِ

t.sahih-int: [Its inhabitants will say], "This is a company bursting in with you. No welcome for them. Indeed, they will burn in the Fire
t.asad: [And they will say to one another: “Do you see] this crowd of people who rushed headlong [into sin] with you? No welcome to them! Verily, they [too] shall have to endure the fire!”
t.yusuf-ali: Here is a troop rushing headlong with you! No welcome for them! truly, they shall burn in the Fire
t.pickthall: Here is an army rushing blindly with you. (Those who are already in the Fire say): No word of welcome for them. Lo! they will roast at the Fire
t.arberry: This is a troop rushing in with you; there is no Welcome for them; they shall roast in the Fire
t.hilali-khan: This is a troop entering with you (in Hell), no welcome for them! Verily, they shall burn in the Fire
t.itani: “This is a crowd rushing headlong with you.” There is no welcome for them. They will be scorched by the Fire.
t.mubarakpuri: This is a troop entering with you (in Hell), no welcome for them! Verily, they shall enter in the Fire!
t.qarib: [Its inhabitants will say], "This is a crowd [of people] rushing in to where you are. No welcome for them. They will burn in the Fire
t.wahiduddin: [And they will say to one another: "Do you see] this crowd of people rushing headlong to join you?" "No welcome to them! Indeed, they are headed for the fire
t.shakir: This is an army plunging in without consideration along with you; no welcome for them, surely they shall enter fire
t.haleem: [It will be said], ‘Here is another crowd of people rushing headlong to join you.’ [The response will be], ‘They are not welcome! They will burn in the Fire.’
t.maariful: (When the leaders of the infidels will see their followers entering the Hell after them, they will say to each other,) “This is a multitude rushing into (the Hell) with you - they are not welcome - they are to burn in the Fire.”
t.khattab: ˹The misleaders will say to one another,˺ “Here is a crowd ˹of followers˺ being thrown in with us. They are not welcome, ˹for˺ they ˹too˺ will burn in the Fire.”
t.ghali: This is a troop rushing along with you; there is no welcome for them; surely they will be roasting in the Fire
t.irving: Here comes a troop rushing at you! They have no welcome here, for they must roast in the Fire
t.iwq: Its inhabitants will say, "This is a company bursting in with you. No welcome for them. Indeed, they will burn in the Fire

t_id.kemenag: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Ini adalah suatu rombongan (pengikut-pengikutmu) yang masuk berdesak-desak bersama kamu (ke neraka)". (Berkata pemimpin-pemimpin mereka yang durhaka): "Tiadalah ucapan selamat datang kepada mereka karena sesungguhnya mereka akan masuk neraka".
t_id.sabiq: Dikatakan kepada para pemimpin orang-orang musyrik yang durhaka, "Ini adalah sekelompok orang yang masuk neraka dengan penuh kesulitan dan berdesak-desakan. Mereka itu adalah para pengikut kalian." Para pemimpin itu kemudian berkata, "Tidak ada ucapan selamat datang bagi mereka. Sesungguhnya mereka benar-benar masuk ke neraka dan merasakan panasnya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: Dan dikatakan kepada mereka sewaktu mereka diseret ke dalam neraka bersama dengan para pengikutnya ("Ini adalah suatu rombongan) suatu gelombang (yang masuk berdesak-desak) dijejalkan masuk (bersama kalian") ke neraka. Kalimat itu dikatakan kepada mereka dengan nada yang keras; maka berkatalah pemimpin-pemimpin mereka yang durhaka, ("Tiadalah ucapan selamat datang kepada mereka) artinya, tiada kelapangan buat mereka (karena sesungguhnya mereka akan masuk neraka.")
t_id.iwq: (Dikatakan kepada mereka): "Ini adalah suatu rombongan (pengikut-pengikutmu) yang masuk berdesak-desak bersama kamu (ke neraka)". (Berkata pemimpin-pemimpin mereka yang durhaka): "Tiadalah ucapan selamat datang kepada mereka karena sesungguhnya mereka akan masuk neraka".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: ويقال لهم عند دخولهم النار بأتباعهم «هذا فوج» جمع «مقتحم» داخل «معكم» النار بشدة فيقول المتبعون «لا مرحبا بهم» أي لا سعة عليهم «إنهم صالوا النار»
tafsir.siraj-ar: هَٰذَا فَوۡجٞ مُّقۡتَحِمٞ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُواْ ٱلنَّارِ (فَوْجٌ: جَمَاعَةٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ النَّارِ, مُّقْتَحِمٌ مَّعَكُمْ: دَاخِلَةٌ النَّارَ مَعَكُمْ, لَا مَرْحَبًا بِهِمْ: لَا رَحَّبَتْ بِهِمْ النَّارُ؛ وَلَا اتَّسَعَتْ مَنَازِلُهُمْ فِيهَا, صَالُوا النَّارِ: مُقَاسُو حَرِّهَا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Dan dikatakan kepada mereka sewaktu mereka diseret ke dalam neraka bersama dengan para pengikutnya ("Ini adalah suatu rombongan) suatu gelombang (yang masuk berdesak-desak) dijejalkan masuk (bersama kalian") ke neraka. Kalimat itu dikatakan kepada mereka dengan nada yang keras; maka berkatalah pemimpin-pemimpin mereka yang durhaka, ("Tiadalah ucapan selamat datang kepada mereka) artinya, tiada kelapangan buat mereka (karena sesungguhnya mereka akan masuk neraka)

ar: قَالُوا۟ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِكُمۡۖ أَنتُمۡ قَدَّمۡتُمُوهُ لَنَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡقَرَارُ
ar_simple: قَالُوا بَلْ أَنْتُمْ لَا مَرْحَبًا بِكُمْ ۖ أَنْتُمْ قَدَّمْتُمُوهُ لَنَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ الْقَرَارُ

t.sahih-int: They will say, "Nor you! No welcome for you. You, [our leaders], brought this upon us, and wretched is the settlement
t.asad: [And] they [who had been seduced] will exclaim: “Nay, but it is you! No welcome to you! It is you who have prepared this for us: and how vile a state to abide in!”
t.yusuf-ali: (The followers shall cry to the misleaders:) "Nay, ye (too)! No welcome for you! It is ye who have brought this upon us! Now evil is (this) place to stay in
t.pickthall: They say: Nay, but you (misleaders), for you there is no word of welcome. Ye prepared this for us (by your misleading). Now hapless is the plight
t.arberry: They say, 'No, it is you have no Welcome; you forwarded it for us; how evil a stablishment
t.hilali-khan: (The followers of the misleaders will say): "Nay, you (too)! No welcome for you! It is you (misleaders) who brought this upon us (because you misled us in the world), so evil is this place to stay in
t.itani: They will say, “But it is you! There is no welcome for you! It is you who brought it upon us! What a miserable end!”
t.mubarakpuri: (The followers will say to those who misled): "Nay, you (too)! No welcome for you! It is you who brought this upon us, so evil is this place to stay in!"
t.qarib: They will say, "Nor you! No welcome for you. You, [our leaders], brought this upon us, what an evil place to settle
t.wahiduddin: They will say to them, "You are not welcome! It was you who brought this on us, an evil place to stay
t.shakir: They shall say: Nay! you-- no welcome to you: you did proffer it to us, so evil is the resting-place
t.haleem: They will say to them, ‘You are not welcome! It was you who brought this on us, an evil place to stay,’
t.maariful: They (the followers) will say (to their leaders) “No, it is you who are not welcome; you are the ones who brought this upon us.” So, how evil is the place to stay (for ever)!”
t.khattab: The followers will respond, “No! You are not welcome! You brought this upon us. What an evil place for settlement!”
t.ghali: They will say, "No indeed, it is you (who) have no welcome; you forwarded it for us; so, miserable is the reposing
t.irving: They will say: "Indeed you have no welcome either. You have prepared it for us; what an awful plight
t.iwq: They will say, "Nor you! No welcome for you. You, our leaders, brought this upon us, and wretched is the settlement

t_id.kemenag: Pengikut-pengikut mereka menjawab: "Sebenarnya kamulah. Tiada ucapan selamat datang bagimu, karena kamulah yang menjerumuskan kami ke dalam azab, maka amat buruklah Jahannam itu sebagai tempat menetap".
t_id.sabiq: Para pengikut mereka menjawab, "Sebenarnya kalianlah yang lebih berhak menerima doa yang kalian panjatkan untuk kami. Sebab kalianlah yang mengajukan siksa ini kepada kami dengan cara menggoda kami dan mengajak kepada kekafiran sehingga kami menjadi kafir. Seburuk-buruk negeri dan tempat tinggal adalah Jahanam."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Pengikut-pengikut mereka berkata) atau mengatakan, ("Sebenarnya kalianlah; tiada ucapan selamat datang bagi kalian, karena kalianlah yang menjerumuskan kami) ke dalam kekafiran (maka amat buruklah tempat tinggal") bagi kami dan kalian, yaitu neraka.
t_id.iwq: Pengikut-pengikut mereka menjawab: "Sebenarnya kamulah. Tiada ucapan selamat datang bagimu, karena kamulah yang menjerumuskan kami ke dalam azab, maka amat buruklah neraka itu sebagai tempat menetap".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا» أي الأتباع «بل أنتم لا مرحبا بكم أنتم قدمتموه» أي الكفر «لنا فبئس القرار» لنا ولكم النار
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِكُمۡۖ أَنتُمۡ قَدَّمۡتُمُوهُ لَنَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡقَرَارُ (الْقَرَارُ: المَقَرُّ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Pengikut-pengikut mereka berkata) atau mengatakan, ("Sebenarnya kalianlah; tiada ucapan selamat datang bagi kalian, karena kalianlah yang menjerumuskan kami) ke dalam kekafiran (maka amat buruklah tempat tinggal") bagi kami dan kalian, yaitu neraka

ar: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَـٰذَا فَزِدۡهُ عَذَابࣰا ضِعۡفࣰا فِی ٱلنَّارِ
ar_simple: قَالُوا رَبَّنَا مَنْ قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدْهُ عَذَابًا ضِعْفًا فِي النَّارِ

t.sahih-int: They will say, "Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us - increase for him double punishment in the Fire
t.asad: [And] they will pray: “O our Sustainer! Whoever has prepared this for us, double Thou his suffering in the fire!”
t.yusuf-ali: They will say: "Our Lord! whoever brought this upon us,- Add to him a double Penalty in the Fire
t.pickthall: They say: Our Lord! Whoever did prepare this for us, oh, give him double portion of the Fire
t.arberry: They say, 'Our Lord, whoso forwarded this for us, give him a double chastisement in the Fire
t.hilali-khan: They will say: "Our Lord! Whoever brought this upon us, add to him a double torment in the Fire
t.itani: They will say, “Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us, give him double torment in the Fire.”
t.mubarakpuri: They will say: "Our Lord! Whoever brought this upon us, add to him a double torment in the Fire!"
t.qarib: They will say, "Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us, double his punishment in the Fire
t.wahiduddin: adding, "Our Lord, give double punishment to those who brought this upon us
t.shakir: They shall say: Our Lord! whoever prepared it first for us, add Thou to him a double chastisement in the fire
t.haleem: adding, ‘Our Lord, give double punishment to those who brought this upon us.’
t.maariful: They (the followers) will say, “Our Lord, whoever has brought this on us, do increase his punishment twofold in the Fire.”
t.khattab: Adding, “Our Lord! Whoever brought this upon us, double their punishment in the Fire.”
t.ghali: They will say, "Our Lord, whoever forwarded this for us, then doubly increase torment for him in the Fire
t.irving: They will say: "Our Lord, whoever prepared this for us? Give him double torment in the Fire
t.iwq: And they will say, "Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us - increase for him double punishment in the Fire

t_id.kemenag: Mereka berkata (lagi): "Ya Tuhan kami; barang siapa yang menjerumuskan kami ke dalam azab ini maka tambahkanlah azab kepadanya dengan berlipat ganda di dalam neraka".
t_id.sabiq: Para pengikut itu berkata, "Wahai Tuhan kami, tambahkanlah orang yang menyebabkan kami mendapat siksa dengan siksa yang berlipat di neraka."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata) lagi, ("Ya Rabb kami! Barang siapa yang menjerumuskan kami ke dalam azab ini, maka tambahkanlah azab kepadanya dengan berlipat ganda) dua kali lipat azab yang diterimanya, sebagai balasan dari kekafirannya (di dalam neraka.")
t_id.iwq: Mereka berkata (lagi): "Ya Tuhan kami; barang siapa yang menjerumuskan kami ke dalam azab ini maka tambahkanlah azab kepadanya dengan berlipat ganda di dalam neraka".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قالوا» أيضا «ربنا من قدم لنا هذا فزده عذابا ضعفا» أي مثل عذابه على كفره «في النار»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالُواْ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدۡهُ عَذَابٗا ضِعۡفٗا فِي ٱلنَّارِ (ضِعْفًا: مُضَاعَفًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka berkata) lagi, ("Ya Rabb kami! Barang siapa yang menjerumuskan kami ke dalam azab ini, maka tambahkanlah azab kepadanya dengan berlipat ganda) dua kali lipat azab yang diterimanya, sebagai balasan dari kekafirannya (di dalam neraka)

ar: وَقَالُوا۟ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالࣰا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَشۡرَارِ
ar_simple: وَقَالُوا مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالًا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُمْ مِنَ الْأَشْرَارِ

t.sahih-int: And they will say, "Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst
t.asad: And they will add: “How is it that we do not see [here any of the] men whom we were wont to count among the wicked
t.yusuf-ali: And they will say: "What has happened to us that we see not men whom we used to number among the bad ones
t.pickthall: And they say: What aileth us that we behold not men whom we were wont to count among the wicked
t.arberry: They say, 'How is it with us, that we do not see men here that we counted among the wicked
t.hilali-khan: And they will say: "What is the matter with us that we see not men whom we used to count among the bad ones
t.itani: And they will say, “What is it with us that we do not see men we used to count among the wicked?
t.mubarakpuri: And they will say: "What is the matter with us that we see not men whom we used to count among the bad ones"
t.qarib: and they will wonder, "Why we do not see men whom we used to count among the worst
t.wahiduddin: And they will say, "How is it that we do not see [here any of the] men whom we used to count among the wicked
t.shakir: And they shall say: What is the matter with us that we do not see men whom we used to count among the vicious
t.haleem: They will say, ‘Why do we not see those we thought were bad
t.maariful: And they (the infidels) will say, “What is the matter with us that we do not see those men (here in Hell) whom we used to count amongst the worst? (i.e the Muslims whom the infidels used to treat as the worst people among them)
t.khattab: The tyrants will ask ˹one another˺, “But why do we not see those we considered to be lowly
t.ghali: And they will say, "How is it with us, (that) we do not see men (here) that we used to count among the evil (ones)
t.irving: They will say: "What is the matter with us that we do not see any men whom we used to consider were evil persons
t.iwq: And they will say, "Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst

t_id.kemenag: Dan (orang-orang durhaka) berkata: "Mengapa kami tidak melihat orang-orang yang dahulu (di dunia) kami anggap sebagai orang-orang yang jahat (hina).
t_id.sabiq: Para penghuni neraka berkata, "Mengapa kami tidak melihat orang-orang yang ketika di dunia kami anggap jahat dan hina yang tidak memiliki kebaikan sama sekali, yaitu orang-orang muslim yang fakir.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata,) yakni orang-orang kafir Mekah, sedang mereka berada dalam neraka, ("Mengapa kami tidak melihat orang-orang yang dahulu kami anggap) sewaktu di dunia (sebagai orang-orang yang hina.")
t_id.iwq: Dan (orang-orang durhaka) berkata: "Mengapa kami tidak melihat orang-orang yang dahulu (di dunia) kami anggap sebagai orang-orang yang jahat (hina).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقالوا» أي كفار مكة وهم في النار «ما لنا لا نرى رجالا كنا نعدهم» في الدنيا «من الأشرار»
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَالُواْ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالٗا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَشۡرَارِ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata,) yakni orang-orang kafir Mekah, sedang mereka berada dalam neraka, ("Mengapa kami tidak melihat orang-orang yang dahulu kami anggap) sewaktu di dunia (sebagai orang-orang yang hina)

ar: أَتَّخَذۡنَـٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِیًّا أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡصَـٰرُ
ar_simple: أَتَّخَذْنَاهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا أَمْ زَاغَتْ عَنْهُمُ الْأَبْصَارُ

t.sahih-int: Is it [because] we took them in ridicule, or has [our] vision turned away from them
t.asad: [and] whom we made the target of our derision? Or is it that [they are here, and] our eyes have missed them?”
t.yusuf-ali: Did we treat them (as such) in ridicule, or have (our) eyes failed to perceive them
t.pickthall: Did we take them (wrongly) for a laughing-stock, or have our eyes missed them
t.arberry: What, did we take them for a laughing-stock? Or have our eyes swerved away from them
t.hilali-khan: Did we take them as an object of mockery, or have (our) eyes failed to perceive them
t.itani: Did we take them for mockery, or have our eyes swerved from them?
t.mubarakpuri: "Did we take them as an object of mockery, or have (our) eyes failed to perceive them"
t.qarib: whom we used to mock? Did our eyes miss them
t.wahiduddin: [and] whom we made the target of our derision? Or are they here, and our eyes have missed them
t.shakir: Was it that we (only) took them in scorn, or have our eyes (now) turned aside from them
t.haleem: and took as a laughing-stock? Have our eyes missed them?’
t.maariful: Had we taken them as a laughing-stock (unjustly), or have our eyes missed them?”
t.khattab: Were we wrong in mocking them ˹in the world˺? Or do our eyes ˹just˺ fail to see them ˹in the Fire˺?”
t.ghali: Did we take them to ourselves as a (target of) scoffing? Or have our be holdings swerved away from them
t.irving: Did we take them for laughingstocks or has our eyesight failed to notice them
t.iwq: Is it because we took them in ridicule, or has our vision turned away from them

t_id.kemenag: Apakah kami dahulu menjadikan mereka olok-olokan, ataukah karena mata kami tidak melihat mereka?"
t_id.sabiq: Bagaimana mereka tidak masuk neraka, sementara ketika di dunia mereka telah kami jadikan bahan olok-olokan. Ataukah mereka telah masuk ke neraka tetapi pandangan kami yang terhalang sehingga tidak melihat mereka."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah kami dahulu menjadikan mereka olok-olokan) lafal Sukhriyyan dapat pula dibaca Sikhriyyan, yakni kami dahulu sewaktu di dunia menghina mereka. Huruf Ya pada lafal Sukhriyyan adalah Nasab; maksudnya apakah mereka tidak ada (ataukah karena tidak melihat) yakni terhalang (mata kami dari melihat mereka) sehingga mata kami tidak dapat melihat mereka. Yang mereka maksud adalah kaum muslimin yang miskin, seperti Ammar, Bilal, Shuhaib, dan Salman.
t_id.iwq: Apakah kami dahulu menjadikan mereka olok-olokan, ataukah karena mata kami tidak melihat mereka?"

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «اتَّخذناهم سخريا» بضم السين وكسرها: كنا نسخر بهم في الدنيا، والياء للنسب: أي أمفقودون هم «أم زاغت» مالت «عنهم الأبصار» فلم ترهم، وهم فقراء المسلمين كعمار وبلال وصهيب وسليمان
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَتَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّا أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرُ (أَتَّخَذْنَاهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا: هَلْ تَحْقِيرُنَا لَهُمْ خَطَأٌ؟ زَاغَتْ: مَالَتْ، فَلَمْ تَقَعْ عَلَيْهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah kami dahulu menjadikan mereka olok-olokan) lafal Sukhriyyan dapat pula dibaca Sikhriyyan, yakni kami dahulu sewaktu di dunia menghina mereka. Huruf Ya pada lafal Sukhriyyan adalah Nasab; maksudnya apakah mereka tidak ada (ataukah karena tidak melihat) yakni terhalang (mata kami dari melihat mereka) sehingga mata kami tidak dapat melihat mereka. Yang mereka maksud adalah kaum muslimin yang miskin, seperti Ammar, Bilal, Shuhaib, dan Salman

ar: إِنَّ ذَ ٰلِكَ لَحَقࣱّ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ ٱلنَّارِ
ar_simple: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ النَّارِ

t.sahih-int: Indeed, that is truth - the quarreling of the people of the Fire
t.asad: Such, behold, will in truth be the [confusion and] mutual wrangling of the people of the fire
t.yusuf-ali: Truly that is just and fitting,- the mutual recriminations of the People of the Fire
t.pickthall: Lo! that is very truth: the wrangling of the dwellers in the Fire
t.arberry: Surely that is true -- the disputing of the inhabitants of the Fire
t.hilali-khan: Verily, that is the very truth, the mutual dispute of the people of the Fire
t.itani: This is certainly true—the feuding of the people of the Fire.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, that is the very truth -- the mutual dispute of the people of the Fire!
t.qarib: This is how it will really be, the bickering of the people of the Fire
t.wahiduddin: All this is certainly true -- the inhabitants of the Fire will blame one another in this way
t.shakir: That most surely is the truth: the contending one with another of the inmates of the fire
t.haleem: This is how it will really be: the inhabitants of the Fire will blame one another in this way
t.maariful: That is going to happen definitely, that is, the mutual quarrel of the people of the Fire
t.khattab: This dispute between the residents of the Fire will certainly come to pass
t.ghali: Surely this is indeed true: the adversaries among the population (Or: the family) of the Fire
t.irving: That is true: the people in the Fire will just argue away
t.iwq: Indeed, that is truth - the quarreling of the people of the Fire

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu pasti terjadi, (yaitu) pertengkaran penghuni neraka.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya pembicaraan para penghuni neraka yang telah Kami sebutkan itu benar dan akan terjadi, yaitu perdebatan dan perselisihan antara sesama mereka.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu pasti terjadi) sudah pasti terjadinya, yaitu (pertengkaran penghuni neraka) sebagaimana yang telah dijelaskan tadi.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu pasti terjadi, (yaitu) pertengkaran penghuni neraka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن ذلك لحق» واجب وقوعه وهو «تخاصم أهل النار» كما تقدم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ ٱلنَّارِ (تَخَاصُمُ: جِدَالُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu pasti terjadi) sudah pasti terjadinya, yaitu (pertengkaran penghuni neraka) sebagaimana yang telah dijelaskan tadi

ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَاۤ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرࣱۖ وَمَا مِنۡ إِلَـٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَ ٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
ar_simple: قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَنَا مُنْذِرٌ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ

t.sahih-int: Say, [O Muhammad], "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allah, the One, the Prevailing
t.asad: SAY [O Muhammad]: “I am only a warner; and there is no deity whatever save God, the One, who holds absolute sway over all that exists
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "Truly am I a Warner: no god is there but the one Allah, Supreme and Irresistible
t.pickthall: Say (unto them, O Muhammad): I am only a warner, and there is no Allah save Allah, the One, the Absolute
t.arberry: Say: 'I am only a warner. There is not any god but God, the One, the Omnipotent
t.hilali-khan: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "I am only a warner and there is no Ilah (God) except Allah (none has the right to be worshipped but Allah) the One, the Irresistible
t.itani: Say, “I am only a warner, and there is no god except God—the One, the Conqueror.
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "I am only a warner and there is no God (worthy of worship) except Allah the One, the Irresistible,"
t.qarib: Say [Prophet], "I am only here to give a warning, and there is no god but God, the One, the All- Conquering
t.wahiduddin: Say, [Prophet], "I am only a warner. There is no god but God, the One, the All-Powerful
t.shakir: Say: I am only a warner, and there is no god but Allah, the One, the Subduer (of all)
t.haleem: [Prophet] say, ‘I am only here to give warning. There is no god but God the One, the All Powerful
t.maariful: Say, “I am only a warner, and there is no god but Allah, the One, the All-Dominant
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “I am only a warner. And there is no god ˹worthy of worship˺ except Allah—the One, the Supreme
t.ghali: Say, "Surely I am only a warner; and in no way is there any god except Allah, The One, The Superb Vanquisher
t.irving: SAY: "I am only a warner, and there is no deity except God Alone the Irresistible
t.iwq: Say, O Muhammad, "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allah, the One, the Prevailing

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah (ya Muhammad): "Sesungguhnya aku hanya seorang pemberi peringatan, dan sekali-kali tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah Yang Maha Esa dan Maha Mengalahkan.
t_id.sabiq: Hai Muhammad, katakan kepada orang-orang musyrik, "Sesunguhnya aku adalah pemberi peringatan akan azab Allah. Tak ada yang patut disembah kecuali Allah Yang Mahaesa, tak bersekutu, dan Mahaperkasa Yang mampu mengalahkan segala penguasa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) hai Muhammad kepada orang-orang kafir Mekah! ("Sesungguhnya aku hanya seorang pemberi peringatan) seorang yang memperingatkan kalian dengan neraka (dan sekali-kali tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah Yang Maha Esa lagi Maha Mengalahkan) semua makhluk-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah (ya Muhammad): "Sesungguhnya aku hanya seorang pemberi peringatan, dan sekali-kali tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah Yang Maha Esa dan Maha Mengalahkan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل» يا محمد لكفار مكة «إنما أنا منذر» مخوّف بالنار «وما من إله إلا الله الواحد القهار» لخلقه
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٞۖ وَمَا مِنۡ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) hai Muhammad kepada orang-orang kafir Mekah! ("Sesungguhnya aku hanya seorang pemberi peringatan) seorang yang memperingatkan kalian dengan neraka (dan sekali-kali tidak ada Tuhan selain Allah Yang Maha Esa lagi Maha Mengalahkan) semua makhluk-Nya

ar: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَ ٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَیۡنَهُمَا ٱلۡعَزِیزُ ٱلۡغَفَّـٰرُ
ar_simple: رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا الْعَزِيزُ الْغَفَّارُ

t.sahih-int: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver
t.asad: the Sustainer of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, the Almighty, the All-Forgiving!”
t.yusuf-ali: The Lord of the heavens and the earth, and all between,- Exalted in Might, able to enforce His Will, forgiving again and again
t.pickthall: Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, the Mighty, the Pardoning
t.arberry: Lord of the heavens and earth, and of what between them is, the All-mighty, the All-forgiving
t.hilali-khan: The Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, the All-Mighty, the Oft-Forgiving
t.itani: The Lord of the heavens and the earth, and everything between them; the Mighty, the Forgiver.”
t.mubarakpuri: "The Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, the Almighty, the Oft-Forgiving."
t.qarib: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Almighty, the Ever-Forgiving
t.wahiduddin: Lord of the heavens and earth and everything between them, the Almighty, the Most Forgiving
t.shakir: The Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, the Mighty, the most Forgiving
t.haleem: Lord of the heavens and earth and everything between, the Almighty, the Most Forgiving.’
t.maariful: the Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, the Mighty, the Very-Forgiving.”
t.khattab: ˹He is the˺ Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything in between—the Almighty, Most Forgiving.”
t.ghali: The Lord of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, The Ever-Mighty, The Superb Forgiver
t.irving: Lord of Heaven and Earth and whatever [lies] in between them, the Powerful, the Forgiving
t.iwq: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the All-Mighty, the Perpetual Forgiver

t_id.kemenag: Tuhan langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Pengampun.
t_id.sabiq: Pemelihara langit dan bumi beserta semua yang ada di antara keduanya, Sang Mahaperkasa Yang tidak terkalahkan, Sang Maha Pengampun atas dosa-dosa orang yang beriman kepada-Nya."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Rabb langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya Yang Maha Perkasa) yakni Maha Menang atas semua perkara-Nya (lagi Maha Pengampun") terhadap kekasih-kekasih-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Tuhan langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Pengampun.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «رب السماوات والأرض وما بينهما العزيز» الغالب على أمره «الغفار» لأوليائه
tafsir.siraj-ar: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفَّـٰرُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Rabb langit dan bumi dan apa yang ada di antara keduanya Yang Maha Perkasa) yakni Maha Menang atas semua perkara-Nya (lagi Maha Pengampun") terhadap kekasih-kekasih-Nya

ar: قُلۡ هُوَ نَبَؤٌا۟ عَظِیمٌ
ar_simple: قُلْ هُوَ نَبَأٌ عَظِيمٌ

t.sahih-int: Say, "It is great news
t.asad: Say: “This is a message tremendous
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "That is a Message Supreme (above all)
t.pickthall: Say: It is tremendous tidings
t.arberry: Say: 'It is a mighty tiding
t.hilali-khan: Say: "That (this Quran) is a great news
t.itani: Say, “It is a message of great importance.
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "That is a great news,"
t.qarib: Say, "It is tremendous news
t.wahiduddin: Say, "This is momentous news
t.shakir: Say: It is a message of importance
t.haleem: Say, ‘This message is a mighty one
t.maariful: Say, “It is a great news
t.khattab: Say, “This ˹Quran˺ is momentous news
t.ghali: Say, (This is addressed to the Prophet) "It is a magnificent tiding
t.irving: SAY: "It is a fateful message you are shunning
t.iwq: Say, "It is great news

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Berita itu adalah berita yang besar,
t_id.sabiq: Katakan kepada mereka, hai Muhammad, "Yang aku sampaikan ini adalah berita besar yang kalian palingkan dan tidak kalian pikirkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka! ("Berita itu adalah berita besar.)
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Berita itu adalah berita yang besar,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل» لهم «هو نبأ عظيم»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ هُوَ نَبَؤٌاْ عَظِيمٌ (نَبَأٌ عَظِيمٌ: القُرْآنُ خَبَرٌ عَظِيمُ النَّفْعِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah) kepada mereka! ("Berita itu adalah berita besar)

ar: أَنتُمۡ عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضُونَ
ar_simple: أَنْتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ

t.sahih-int: From which you turn away
t.asad: [how can] you turn away from it?”
t.yusuf-ali: From which ye do turn away
t.pickthall: Whence ye turn away
t.arberry: from which you are turning away
t.hilali-khan: From which you turn away
t.itani: From which you are turning away.
t.mubarakpuri: "From which you turn away!"
t.qarib: yet you ignore it
t.wahiduddin: yet you ignore it
t.shakir: (And) you are turning aside from it
t.haleem: yet you ignore it
t.maariful: to which you are averse
t.khattab: from which you ˹pagans˺ are turning away.”
t.ghali: From which you are veering away
t.irving: I have no knowledge about the supreme council such as they claim to have
t.iwq: From which you turn away

t_id.kemenag: yang kamu berpaling daripadanya.
t_id.sabiq: Katakan kepada mereka, hai Muhammad, "Yang aku sampaikan ini adalah berita besar yang kalian palingkan dan tidak kalian pikirkan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yang kalian berpaling darinya) dari Alquran yang aku beritakan dan aku datangkan kepada kalian; di dalamnya terdapat hal-hal yang tidak dapat diketahui, melainkan hanya dengan jalan wahyu. Yang dimaksud dengan berita yang besar itu ialah:
t_id.iwq: yang kamu berpaling daripadanya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أنتم عنه معرضون» أي القرآن الذي أنبأتكم به وجئتكم فيه بما لا يعلم إلا بوحي وهو قوله
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَنتُمۡ عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yang kalian berpaling darinya) dari Alquran yang aku beritakan dan aku datangkan kepada kalian; di dalamnya terdapat hal-hal yang tidak dapat diketahui, melainkan hanya dengan jalan wahyu. Yang dimaksud dengan berita yang besar itu ialah

ar: مَا كَانَ لِیَ مِنۡ عِلۡمِۭ بِٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰۤ إِذۡ یَخۡتَصِمُونَ
ar_simple: مَا كَانَ لِيَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ بِالْمَلَإِ الْأَعْلَىٰ إِذْ يَخْتَصِمُونَ

t.sahih-int: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly [of angels] when they were disputing [the creation of Adam]
t.asad: [Say, O Muhammad:] “No knowledge would I have had of [what passed among] the host on high when they argued [against the creation of man]
t.yusuf-ali: No knowledge have I of the Chiefs on high, when they discuss (matters) among themselves
t.pickthall: I had no knowledge of the Highest Chiefs when they disputed
t.arberry: I had no knowledge of the High Council when they disputed
t.hilali-khan: I had no knowledge of the chiefs (angels) on high when they were disputing and discussing (about the creation of Adam)
t.itani: I have no knowledge of the Highest Assembly as they dispute.
t.mubarakpuri: "I had no knowledge of the chiefs (angels) on high when they were disputing and discussing."
t.qarib: I had no knowledge of what those on high bicker about
t.wahiduddin: I had no knowledge of the Exalted Assembly when they argued [against the creation of man]
t.shakir: I had no knowledge of the exalted chiefs when they contended
t.haleem: I have no knowledge of what those on high discuss
t.maariful: I had no knowledge of the Heavenly Beings when they were debating (about the creation of ’Ādam)
t.khattab: ˹And say,˺ “I had no knowledge of the highest assembly ˹in heaven˺ when they differed ˹concerning Adam˺
t.ghali: In no way did I have any knowledge of the most exalted Chiefs (of the Angels) as they took adversary stands (among themselves)
t.irving: It has been revealed to me only that I am a plain warner
t.iwq: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly of angels when they were disputing the creation of Adam

t_id.kemenag: Aku tiada mempunyai pengetahuan sedikitpun tentang al mala'ul a'la (malaikat) itu ketika mereka berbantah-bantahan.
t_id.sabiq: Aku tidak pernah tahu berita tentang para malaikat ketika mereka berselisih mengenai ihwal Adam. Sebab aku tidak menempuh jalan yang biasa digunakan orang untuk memperoleh pengetahuan, seperti membaca buku atau berguru kepada seseorang. Cara yang aku tempuh untuk memperoleh pengetahuan adalah melalui wahyu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Aku tiada mempunyai pengetahuan sedikit pun tentang Al-Mala'ul A'la) yakni para malaikat itu (ketika mereka berbantah-bantahan) tentang perihal Nabi Adam, ketika Allah berfirman, 'Sesungguhnya Aku hendak menjadikan seorang khalifah di muka bumi...' (Q.S. Al-Baqarah, 30)
t_id.iwq: Aku tiada mempunyai pengetahuan sedikitpun tentang al mala'ul a'la (malaikat) itu ketika mereka berbantah-bantahan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ما كان ليَ من علم بالملإ الأعلى» أي الملائكة «إذ يختصمون» في شأن آدم حين قال الله تعالى: (إني جاعل في الأرض خليفة) الخ
tafsir.siraj-ar: مَا كَانَ لِيَ مِنۡ عِلۡمِۭ بِٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰٓ إِذۡ يَخۡتَصِمُونَ (بِالْمَلَإِ الْأَعْلَى: المَلَائِكَةِ, يَخْتَصِمُونَ: يَتَجَادَلُونَ فِي شَانِ خَلْقِ آدَمَ - عليه السلام)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Aku tiada mempunyai pengetahuan sedikit pun tentang Al-Mala'ul A'la) yakni para malaikat itu (ketika mereka berbantah-bantahan) tentang perihal Nabi Adam, ketika Allah berfirman, 'Sesungguhnya Aku hendak menjadikan seorang khalifah di muka bumi...' (Q.S. Al-Baqarah)

ar: إِن یُوحَىٰۤ إِلَیَّ إِلَّاۤ أَنَّمَاۤ أَنَا۠ نَذِیرࣱ مُّبِینٌ
ar_simple: إِنْ يُوحَىٰ إِلَيَّ إِلَّا أَنَّمَا أَنَا نَذِيرٌ مُبِينٌ

t.sahih-int: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner
t.asad: had it not been revealed unto me [by God] - to no other end than that I might convey [unto you] a plain warning
t.yusuf-ali: Only this has been revealed to me: that I am to give warning plainly and publicly
t.pickthall: It is revealed unto me only that I may be a plain warner
t.arberry: This alone is revealed to me, that I am only a clear warner
t.hilali-khan: Only this has been inspired to me, that I am a plain warner
t.itani: It is only revealed to me that I am a clear warner.”
t.mubarakpuri: "Only this has been revealed to me, that I am a plain warner."
t.qarib: had it not been revealed to me. However, I am but a clear warner
t.wahiduddin: it has only been revealed to me that I am a plain warner
t.shakir: Naught is revealed to me save that I am a plain warner
t.haleem: it is only revealed to me that I am here to give clear warning.’
t.maariful: Revelation is sent to me only because I am a plain warner
t.khattab: What is revealed to me is that I am only sent with a clear warning.”
t.ghali: Decidedly nothing is revealed to me except that surely I am only an evident constant warner
t.irving: Once your Lord told the angels: "I am about to create a human being out of clay
t.iwq: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner

t_id.kemenag: Tidak diwahyukan kepadaku, melainkan bahwa sesungguhnya aku hanyalah seorang pemberi peringatan yang nyata".
t_id.sabiq: Aku tidak akan mendapatkan wahyu kecuali karena aku adalah seorang rasul yang bertugas menyampaikan risalah kepada kalian dengan bahasa yang paling jelas."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tidak) tiada (diwahyukan kepadaku, melainkan bahwa sesungguhnya aku) yakni aku ini (hanyalah seorang pemberi peringatan yang nyata") artinya nyata peringatannya.
t_id.iwq: Tidak diwahyukan kepadaku, melainkan bahwa sesungguhnya aku hanyalah seorang pemberi peringatan yang nyata".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن» ما «يوحى إليَّ إلا أنما أنا» أي أني «نذير مبين» بيَّن الإنذار
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٌ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tidak) tiada (diwahyukan kepadaku, melainkan bahwa sesungguhnya aku) yakni aku ini (hanyalah seorang pemberi peringatan yang nyata") artinya nyata peringatannya

ar: إِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَـٰۤئِكَةِ إِنِّی خَـٰلِقُۢ بَشَرࣰا مِّن طِینࣲ
ar_simple: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ

t.sahih-int: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay
t.asad: [For,] lo, thy Sustainer said unto the angels: “Behold, I am about to create a human being out of clay
t.yusuf-ali: Behold, thy Lord said to the angels: "I am about to create man from clay
t.pickthall: When thy Lord said unto the angels: Lo! I am about to create a mortal out of mire
t.arberry: When thy Lord said to the angels, 'See, I am creating a mortal of a clay
t.hilali-khan: (Remember) when your Lord said to the angels: "Truly, I am going to create man from clay
t.itani: Your Lord said to the angels, “I am creating a human being from clay.
t.mubarakpuri: (Remember) when your Lord said to the angels: "Truly, I am going to create man from clay."
t.qarib: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, " I am going to create a human being from clay
t.wahiduddin: Your Lord said to the angels, "I am about to create a human being out of clay
t.shakir: When your Lord said to the angels; Surely I am going to create a mortal from dust
t.haleem: Your Lord said to the angels, ‘I will create a man from clay
t.maariful: When your Lord said to the angels, “I am going to create man from clay
t.khattab: ˹Remember, O Prophet˺ when your Lord said to the angels, “I am going to create a human being from clay
t.ghali: (Remember) as your Lord said to the Angels, "Surely I am creating a mortal of a clay
t.irving: When I have fashioned him and breathed some of My spirit into him, drop down on your knees before him
t.iwq: So mention when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay

t_id.kemenag: (Ingatlah) ketika Tuhanmu berfirman kepada malaikat: "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan manusia dari tanah".
t_id.sabiq: Ingatkanlah mereka ketika Tuhanmu berkata kepada malaikat, "Sesungguhnya Aku telah menciptakan seorang manusia, yaitu Adam a. s., dari tanah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Ingatlah (ketika Rabbmu berfirman kepada malaikat, "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan manusia dari tanah) yaitu Adam.
t_id.iwq: (Ingatlah) ketika Tuhanmu berfirman kepada malaikat: "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan manusia dari tanah".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: اذكر «إذ قال ربك للملائكة إني خالق بشرا من طين» هو آدم
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَٰلِقُۢ بَشَرٗا مِّن طِينٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Ingatlah (ketika Rabbmu berfirman kepada malaikat, "Sesungguhnya Aku akan menciptakan manusia dari tanah) yaitu Adam

ar: فَإِذَا سَوَّیۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِیهِ مِن رُّوحِی فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَـٰجِدِینَ
ar_simple: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِنْ رُوحِي فَقَعُوا لَهُ سَاجِدِينَ

t.sahih-int: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration
t.asad: and when I have formed him fully and breathed into him of My spirit, fall you down before him in prostration!”
t.yusuf-ali: When I have fashioned him (in due proportion) and breathed into him of My spirit, fall ye down in obeisance unto him
t.pickthall: And when I have fashioned him and breathed into him of My Spirit, then fall down before him prostrate
t.arberry: When I have shaped him, and breathed My spirit in him, fall you down, bowing before him
t.hilali-khan: So when I have fashioned him and breathed into him (his) soul created by Me, then you fall down prostrate to him
t.itani: When I have formed him, and breathed into him of My spirit, fall prostrate before him.
t.mubarakpuri: "So, when I have fashioned him and breathed into him (his) soul created by Me, then you fall down prostrate to him."
t.qarib: and when I have proportioned him and breathed of My spirit into him, then prostrate yourselves to him
t.wahiduddin: and when I have formed him fully and breathed My spirit into him, prostrate yourselves before him
t.shakir: So when I have made him complete and breathed into him of My spirit, then fall down making obeisance to him
t.haleem: When I have shaped him and breathed from My Spirit into him, bow down before him.’
t.maariful: So, once I make him perfectly and breath My spirit into him, you must fall down in prostration before him.”
t.khattab: So when I have fashioned him and had a spirit of My Own ˹creation˺ breathed into him, fall down in prostration to him.”
t.ghali: So when I have molded him and breathed into him of My Spirit, then fall down to him prostrating
t.irving: The angels all bowed down on their knees together
t.iwq: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My created soul, then fall down to him in prostration

t_id.kemenag: Maka apabila telah Kusempurnakan kejadiannya dan Kutiupkan kepadanya roh (ciptaan)Ku; maka hendaklah kamu tersungkur dengan bersujud kepadanya".
t_id.sabiq: Apabila Aku telah menyempurnakan penciptaannya dan telah meniupkan rahasia kehidupan--yaitu roh--kepadanya, maka tunduklah kalian dengan sujud penghormatan, bukan sujud penghambaan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apabila telah Kusempurnakan kejadiannya) telah sempurna kejadiannya (dan Kutiupkan) Kualirkan (kepadanya roh ciptaan-Ku) sehingga ia menjadi hidup. Dimudhafkannya lafal ruh kepada Allah dimaksud untuk memuliakan Nabi Adam. Roh adalah tubuh yang lembut dan tidak kelihatan oleh mata, yang membuat manusia dapat hidup karena memasuki tubuhnya (maka hendaklah kalian bersungkur dengan sujud kepadanya") sujud penghormatan dengan cara membungkukkan badan.
t_id.iwq: Maka apabila telah Kusempurnakan kejadiannya dan Kutiupkan kepadanya roh (ciptaan)Ku; maka hendaklah kamu tersungkur dengan bersujud kepadanya".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فإذا سويته» أتمته «ونفخت» أجريت «فيه من روحي» فصار حيا، وإضافة الروح إليه تشريف لآدم والروح جسم لطيف يحيا به الإنسان بنفوذه فيه «فقعوا له ساجدين» سجود تحية بالانحناء
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَإِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُواْ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ (سَوَّيْتُهُ: خَلَقْتُ جَسَدَهُ كَامِلًا مُتَنَاسِقَ الأَعْضَاءِ, سَاجِدِينَ: سُجُودَ تَحِيَّةٍ وَإِكْرَامٍ، لَا سُجُودَ عِبَادَةٍ وَتَعْظِيمٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka apabila telah Kusempurnakan kejadiannya) telah sempurna kejadiannya (dan Kutiupkan) Kualirkan (kepadanya roh ciptaan-Ku) sehingga ia menjadi hidup. Dimudhafkannya lafal ruh kepada Allah dimaksud untuk memuliakan Nabi Adam. Roh adalah tubuh yang lembut dan tidak kelihatan oleh mata, yang membuat manusia dapat hidup karena memasuki tubuhnya (maka hendaklah kalian bersungkur dengan sujud kepadanya") sujud penghormatan dengan cara membungkukkan badan

ar: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰۤئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
ar_simple: فَسَجَدَ الْمَلَائِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ

t.sahih-int: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely
t.asad: Thereupon the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.yusuf-ali: So the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.pickthall: The angels fell down prostrate, every one
t.arberry: Then the angels bowed themselves all together
t.hilali-khan: So the angels prostrated themselves, all of them
t.itani: So the angels fell prostrate, all of them.
t.mubarakpuri: So, the angels prostrated themselves, all of them,
t.qarib: The angels prostrated, all of them together
t.wahiduddin: Thereupon the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.shakir: And the angels did obeisance, all of them
t.haleem: The angels all bowed down together
t.maariful: Then, the angels prostrated themselves, all of them together
t.khattab: So the angels prostrated all together—
t.ghali: So the Angels prostrated themselves, all of them all together
t.irving: except for Diabolis; he was too proud and a disbeliever besides
t.iwq: Thus the angels prostrated - all of them entirely

t_id.kemenag: Lalu seluruh malaikat-malaikat itu bersujud semuanya,
t_id.sabiq: Semua malaikat pun melaksanakan perintah itu dan melakukan sujud penghormatan kepada Adam, kecuali Iblîs yang tidak mau bersujud.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Lalu seluruh malaikat itu sujud semuanya) di dalam ayat ini terdapat dua Taukid, yaitu lafal Kulluhum dan lafal Ajma 'uuna.
t_id.iwq: Lalu seluruh malaikat-malaikat itu bersujud semuanya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فسجد الملائكة كلهم أجمعون» فيه تأكيدان
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Lalu seluruh malaikat itu sujud semuanya) di dalam ayat ini terdapat dua Taukid, yaitu lafal Kulluhum dan lafal Ajma 'uuna

ar: إِلَّاۤ إِبۡلِیسَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَـٰفِرِینَ
ar_simple: إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ اسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ

t.sahih-int: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers
t.asad: save Iblis: he gloried in his arrogance, and [thus] became one of those who deny the truth
t.yusuf-ali: Not so Iblis: he was haughty, and became one of those who reject Faith
t.pickthall: Saving Iblis; he was scornful and became one of the disbelievers
t.arberry: save Iblis; he waxed proud, and was one of the unbelievers
t.hilali-khan: Except Iblis (Satan) he was proud and was one of the disbelievers
t.itani: Except for Satan. He was too proud, and one of the faithless.
t.mubarakpuri: Except Iblis, he was proud and was one of the disbelievers.
t.qarib: except Iblis ; he was arrogant and became a [rebel] who denied the truth
t.wahiduddin: but not Satan, who was too proud. He became one of those who deny the truth
t.shakir: But not Iblis: he was proud and he was one of the unbelievers
t.haleem: but not Iblis, who was too proud. He became a rebel
t.maariful: except Iblīs (Satan). He waxed proud, and became one of the disbelievers
t.khattab: but not Iblîs, who acted arrogantly, becoming unfaithful
t.ghali: Except Iblis; he waxed proud, and was (one) of the disbelievers
t.irving: He said: ´Diabolis, what prevents you from kneeling down before something I have created with My own hands? Have you become too proud
t.iwq: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among those who disbelieve

t_id.kemenag: kecuali iblis; dia menyombongkan diri dan adalah dia termasuk orang-orang yang kafir.
t_id.sabiq: Semua malaikat pun melaksanakan perintah itu dan melakukan sujud penghormatan kepada Adam, kecuali Iblîs yang tidak mau bersujud.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali iblis) dia adalah bapaknya jin yang dahulunya campur bersama dengan malaikat (dia menyombongkan diri dan adalah dia termasuk orang-orang yang kafir) menurut ilmu Allah.
t_id.iwq: kecuali iblis; dia menyombongkan diri dan adalah dia termasuk orang-orang yang kafir.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا إبليس» هو أبو الجنّ كان بين الملائكة «استكبر وكان من الكافرين» في علم الله تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali iblis) dia adalah bapaknya jin yang dahulunya campur bersama dengan malaikat (dia menyombongkan diri dan adalah dia termasuk orang-orang yang kafir) menurut ilmu Allah

ar: قَالَ یَـٰۤإِبۡلِیسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسۡجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقۡتُ بِیَدَیَّۖ أَسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ أَمۡ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَالِینَ
ar_simple: قَالَ يَا إِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَنْ تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَيَّ ۖ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنْتَ مِنَ الْعَالِينَ

t.sahih-int: [Allah] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty
t.asad: Said He: “O Iblis! What has kept thee from prostrating thyself before that [being] which I have created with My hands? Art thou too proud [to bow down before another created being], or art thou of those who think [only] of themselves as high?”
t.yusuf-ali: (Allah) said: "O Iblis! What prevents thee from prostrating thyself to one whom I have created with my hands? Art thou haughty? Or art thou one of the high (and mighty) ones
t.pickthall: He said: O Iblis! What hindereth thee from falling prostrate before that which I have created with both My hands? Art thou too proud or art thou of the high exalted
t.arberry: Said He, 'Iblis, what prevented thee to bow thyself before that I created with My own hands? Hast thou waxed proud, or art thou of the lofty ones
t.hilali-khan: (Allah) said: "O Iblis (Satan)! What prevents you from prostrating yourself to one whom I have created with Both My Hands. Are you too proud (to fall prostrate to Adam) or are you one of the high exalted
t.itani: He said, “O Satan, what prevented you from prostrating before what I created with My Own hands? Are you too proud, or were you one of the exalted?”
t.mubarakpuri: (Allah) said: "O Iblis! What prevents you from prostrating yourself to one whom I have created with Both My Hands. Are you too proud or are you one of the high exalted"
t.qarib: [God] said, "Iblis , what prevented you from prostrating yourself to what I created with My hands? Is it your arrogance, or do you think that you are so high above all others
t.wahiduddin: God said, "Satan, what prevented you from prostrating yourself to what I created with My own Hands? Were you overcome by arrogance, or are you of those who think [only] of themselves as exalted
t.shakir: He said: O Iblis! what prevented you that you should do obeisance to him whom I created with My two hands? Are you proud or are you of the exalted ones
t.haleem: God said, ‘Iblis, what prevents you from bowing down to the man I have made with My own hands? Are you too high and mighty?’
t.maariful: He (Allah) said, “O Iblīs, what did prevent you from prostrating yourself before what I created with My hands? Did you wax proud or were you among the lofty ones?”
t.khattab: Allah asked, “O Iblîs! What prevented you from prostrating to what I created with My Own Hands? Did you ˹just˺ become proud? Or have you always been arrogant?”
t.ghali: Said He, "O Iblis, what prevented you to prostrate yourself to what I created with My Hands? Have you waxed proud, or are you of the exalted
t.irving: or are you overbearing
t.iwq: Allah said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant then, or were you already among the haughty

t_id.kemenag: Allah berfirman: "Hai iblis, apakah yang menghalangi kamu sujud kepada yang telah Ku-ciptakan dengan kedua tangan-Ku. Apakah kamu menyombongkan diri ataukah kamu (merasa) termasuk orang-orang yang (lebih) tinggi?".
t_id.sabiq: Allah berkata, "Wahai Iblîs, apa yang membuatmu tidak mau bersujud hormat kepada makhluk yang Aku ciptakan sendiri tanpa perantara? Merasa besarkah kamu, padahal kamu tidak besar, atau kamu benar- benar tinggi?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Hai iblis! Apakah yang menghalangi kamu sujud kepada yang telah Kuciptakan dengan kedua tangan kekuasaan-Ku?) maksudnya, yang telah Aku atur penciptaannya secara langsung; ungkapan ini dimaksud memuliakan kedudukan Nabi Adam, karena sesungguhnya setiap makhluk diciptakan oleh Allah secara langsung. (Apakah kamu menyombongkan diri) sekarang sehingga kamu tidak mau bersujud kepadanya; Istifham atau kata tanya di sini menunjukkan makna cemoohan (ataukah kamu merasa termasuk orang-orang yang lebih tinggi?") merasa tinggi diri sehingga kamu bersikap takabur tidak mau bersujud.
t_id.iwq: Allah berfirman: "Hai iblis, apakah yang menghalangi kamu sujud kepada yang telah Ku-ciptakan dengan kedua tangan-Ku. Apakah kamu menyombongkan diri ataukah kamu (merasa) termasuk orang-orang yang (lebih) tinggi?".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال يا إبليس ما منعك أن تسجد لما خلقت بيديَّ» أي توليت خلقه وهذا تشريف لآدم فإن كل مخلوق تولى الله خلقه «أستكبرت» الآن عن السجود استفهام توبيخ «أم كنت من العالين» المتكبرين فتكبرت عن السجود لكونك منهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبۡلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسۡجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقۡتُ بِيَدَيَّۖ أَسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ أَمۡ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَالِينَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Allah berfirman, "Hai iblis! Apakah yang menghalangi kamu sujud kepada yang telah Kuciptakan dengan kedua tangan kekuasaan-Ku?) maksudnya, yang telah Aku atur penciptaannya secara langsung; ungkapan ini dimaksud memuliakan kedudukan Nabi Adam, karena sesungguhnya setiap makhluk diciptakan oleh Allah secara langsung. (Apakah kamu menyombongkan diri) sekarang sehingga kamu tidak mau bersujud kepadanya; Istifham atau kata tanya di sini menunjukkan makna cemoohan (ataukah kamu merasa termasuk orang-orang yang lebih tinggi?") merasa tinggi diri sehingga kamu bersikap takabur tidak mau bersujud

ar: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَیۡرࣱ مِّنۡهُ خَلَقۡتَنِی مِن نَّارࣲ وَخَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن طِینࣲ
ar_simple: قَالَ أَنَا خَيْرٌ مِنْهُ ۖ خَلَقْتَنِي مِنْ نَارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُ مِنْ طِينٍ

t.sahih-int: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay
t.asad: Answered [Iblis]: “I am better than he: Thou hast created me out of fire, whereas him Thou hast created out of clay.”
t.yusuf-ali: (Iblis) said: "I am better than he: thou createdst me from fire, and him thou createdst from clay
t.pickthall: He said: I am better than him. Thou createdst me of fire, whilst him Thou didst create of clay
t.arberry: Said he, 'I am better than he; Thou createdst me of fire, and him Thou createdst of clay
t.hilali-khan: Iblis (Satan)] said: "I am better than he, You created me from fire, and You created him from clay
t.itani: He said, “I am better than he; You created me from fire, and You created him from clay.”
t.mubarakpuri: [Iblis] said: "I am better than he. You created me from fire, and You created him from clay."
t.qarib: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay
t.wahiduddin: Satan replied, "I am better than him. You created me from fire, but You created him from clay
t.shakir: He said: I am better than he; Thou hast created me of fire, and him Thou didst create of dust
t.haleem: Iblis said, ‘I am better than him: You made me from fire, and him from clay.’
t.maariful: He said, “I am better than him. You created me from fire, and created him from clay.”
t.khattab: He replied, “I am better than he is: You created me from fire and him from clay.”
t.ghali: Said he, "I am more charitable (i.e., better) than he; You created me of fire, and him You created of clay
t.irving: He said: "I am better than he is: You created me from fire while You created him from clay
t.iwq: And he said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay

t_id.kemenag: Iblis berkata: "Aku lebih baik daripadanya, karena Engkau ciptakan aku dari api, sedangkan dia Engkau ciptakan dari tanah".
t_id.sabiq: Iblîs berkata, "Aku lebih baik daripada Adam, sebab aku Engkau ciptakan dari api sedangkan Adam Engkau ciptakan dari tanah. Bagaimama aku sujud kepadanya?"
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Iblis berkata, "Aku lebih baik daripadanya, karena Engkau ciptakan aku dari api, sedangkan dia Engkau ciptakan dari tanah.")
t_id.iwq: Iblis berkata: "Aku lebih baik daripadanya, karena Engkau ciptakan aku dari api, sedangkan dia Engkau ciptakan dari tanah".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قال أنا خير منه خلقتني من نار وخلقته من طين»
tafsir.siraj-ar: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهُ خَلَقۡتَنِي مِن نَّارٖ وَخَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن طِينٖ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Iblis berkata, "Aku lebih baik daripadanya, karena Engkau ciptakan aku dari api, sedangkan dia Engkau ciptakan dari tanah

ar: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِیمࣱ
ar_simple: قَالَ فَاخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ

t.sahih-int: [Allah] said, "Then get out of Paradise, for indeed, you are expelled
t.asad: Said He: “Go forth, then, from this [angelic state] - for, behold, thou art henceforth accursed
t.yusuf-ali: (Allah) said: "Then get thee out from here: for thou art rejected, accursed
t.pickthall: He said: Go forth from hence, for lo! thou art outcast
t.arberry: Said He, 'Then go thou forth hence; thou art accursed
t.hilali-khan: (Allah) said: "Then get out from here, for verily, you are outcast
t.itani: He said, “Then get out of here! You are an outcast!
t.mubarakpuri: (Allah) said: "Then get out from here; for verily, you are outcast."
t.qarib: [God] said, "Then be gone, you are expelled
t.wahiduddin: Begone! You are accursed
t.shakir: He said: Then get out of it, for surely you are driven away
t.haleem: ‘Get out of here! You are rejected
t.maariful: He said, “Then, get out from here, for you are accursed
t.khattab: Allah commanded, “Then get out of Paradise, for you are truly cursed
t.ghali: Said He, "Then get (Literally: go out) out of it; so surely you are a constant outcast
t.irving: He said: "Clear out of here! You are an outcast
t.iwq: Allah said, "Then get out of Paradise, for indeed, you are expelled
